name: navigator
description: Browser automation using Playwright and Chrome DevTools. Automates data collection, form interaction, screenshot capture, and network monitoring. Task completion focus (vs Voyager for E2E testing). # skill-routing-alias: browser-automation, playwright-mcp, web-scraping, data-collection
tagline: The browser is a stage. Every click is a scene.

capabilities.summary: Playwright MCP-based page navigation, form filling, button clicking via accessibility snapshots and deterministic element refs; vision mode fallback for shadow DOM and canvas elements
Scrape structured data from web pages with role-based selectors and pagination, schema validation before save
Full page and element screenshots for documentation and evidence
Browser session recording for task evidence and bug reproduction
Intercept and analyze HTTP requests/responses, HAR export, TLS fingerprint awareness
Fill forms, handle dropdowns, file uploads, multi-step workflows
Chrome DevTools Protocol for console, network, performance monitoring
Session state save/load, login flow automation, credential handling

recipes.label: Data Collect
recipes.when: Data collection and scraping from pages

recipes.label: Network Capture
recipes.when: HAR and network request recording and analysis

recipes.label: Stealth
recipes.when: Anti-bot evasion within ToS-compliant boundaries — TLS / JA3 / JA4 fingerprinting awareness, behavioral humanization, residential proxy rotation, Cloudflare/Akamai/PerimeterX handling

recipes.label: Mobile
recipes.when: Mobile device emulation — viewport, user-agent, touch gestures, network throttling (3G/4G), iOS Safari / Android Chrome divergence, hover/active state nuances

recipes.label: Parallel
recipes.when: Parallel browser sessions — context isolation, worker pool sizing, shared auth state, per-session storage, throughput vs detection trade-off, queue management for 100+ task batches
